Liverpool fan Graeme Kelly, who has more than 65,000 followers on the social-networking site, is a constant source of Kop transfer news.

Speaking on the Code Red podcast, Kelly said he has heard from those inside the club that a deal for midfielder Keita, 21, was done.

The Reds were told to bid £66million, which they eventually did, only to be stunned when the offer was knocked back.

Kelly now thinks that RB Leipzig are just trying to get attention on themselves and that's their motivation this summer.

Kelly said: "Don't get me wrong, I think their stance will weaken somewhat but Red Bull love the press.

"I was told Red Bull said to Liverpool: 'For £66million, he's yours.' We bid lower than that first time, £53m, but we went back and bid £66m and they turned it down.

"Even everyone at the club were dumbfounded. They thought it was a done deal.

"I think it's Red Bull just wanting the limelight. It strikes me as odd for a club last year whose revenue was just €82m. They are in a massive amount of debt and they've turned down almost their entire year's revenue for one player.

"It doesn't ring true for me. I don't see how they can do that.

"Anyone can buy him for £45m next season so I just don't see what they're doing here.

"I think Red Bull played the game with almost everyone.

"I was told it'd go back and forth and they'll create this story.

"Apparently when the bid came in and they turned it down someone said Jurgen Klopp actually laughed, because they were a crazy club.

"They don't do things the way football clubs do."

利物浦在歐聯附將硬撼賀芬咸，後者的少帥拿高斯文自爆早就預計會紅軍，所以一早制訂了作戰計劃。
年僅30歲的拿高斯文（Julian Nagelsmann）是德甲最有名的少帥，上季帶領賀芬咸拿下第4名。他笑言已預料在歐聯附會抽中鬥利物浦，所以早有準備：「我看了利物浦在奧迪盃2場比賽，踢得非常好。我對於出戰他們已有些想法，但還要多看1或2場比賽，去想想如何實行。」
賀芬咸的成功之道，除了有這名戰術多變的少帥之外，背後的富豪班主賀比也功不可沒；他入主後，帶領球隊從第5級別的業餘兵，搖身一變成為歐聯一份子。
賀比表示，很期待對紅軍的德國籍領隊高普：「鬥高普一定會非常特別，同時我也想再看到（前賀芬咸球員）羅拔圖法明奴。我們沒有壓力，只想勝出，我相信拿高斯文會好好調配球隊。」
